title: Grotto Worker Manifest
description: Manifest contract for an Grotto worker image. All workers must declare this manifest so the orchestrator can register, route, and apply policy correctly.

context_profiles.description: Named context/cost profiles that define token and call limits for tasks under this capability. The orchestrator selects the appropriate profile based on expected task size.
Worker-level default context/cost profiles. Capability-level profiles override these.

context_profile.description: Defines context window, token budget, and tool-call limits for a named task profile.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this profile is designed for.

max_single_prompt_tokens.description: Maximum tokens that may be sent to a model in a single prompt call. 0 means no model calls are made (deterministic-only). Inputs larger than this must be chunked or stored as artifacts and summarised.

max_total_task_tokens.description: Maximum cumulative tokens across all model calls for the entire task. 0 means no model calls are made (deterministic-only). Enforced by the worker before submitting any model call.

max_model_calls_per_task.description: Maximum number of LLM/model API calls this task profile may make. 0 means deterministic-only (no model calls).

max_tool_calls_per_task.description: Maximum number of deterministic tool calls (pdftotext, qpdf, ocrmypdf, etc.) across the task.

artifact_first.description: If true, the worker must store the full input as a task artifact before doing any processing. No full-document content is passed directly into model prompts.

chunking_required.description: If true, the worker must chunk the input before model processing. Applies to large documents that exceed max_single_prompt_tokens.

preferred_model_class.description: Hint to the orchestrator about which model tier should process this task profile. 'none' means deterministic tools only.

deterministic_tools_first.description: If true, the worker must exhaust deterministic tool options before making any model call.
